case_title: K&K PLUMBING & FIRE PROTECTION INC. VS. ROQUE (ROCK) FERNANDES

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF K&K PLUMBING & FIRE PROTECTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDES, ROQUE (ROCK)
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY K&K PLUMBING & FIRE PROTECTION INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDES, ROQUE (ROCK) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
